documents.title: Nominee 278
documents.summary: Public financial disclosure filed before Senate confirmation as Social Security Administration Commissioner. Lists Fiserv Inc holdings (stock, vested stock options, Performance Equity Grants for 2023 and 2024 vesting in 2026 and 2027), three Remainder Trusts, and outside positions including 9/11 Memorial, Mt. Sinai Health System, and Cathedral of St. Patrick.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Letter signed Feb 24, 2025. Commits to: resign all Fiserv positions and divest stock + vested options within 120 days (Section 2); divest Fiserv held in Remainder Trusts 1, 2, and 3, then resign as trustee (Section 3); resign from National September 11 Memorial & Museum, Perelman Performing Arts Center, The Battery Conservancy, Mt. Sinai Health System, Metro Atlanta Chamber, American Society of the Italian Legion of Merit, Institute for Veterans and Military Families – Syracuse University, Partnership for New York City (Section 4); retain unpaid Cathedral of St. Patrick board roles (Section 5).

documents.title: 278 Transaction Report
documents.summary: Periodic transaction report (Form 278-T) disclosing individual securities transactions over $1,000 during the reporting window. See PDF for itemized transactions including any Fiserv stock disposals.

documents.title: Certificate of Divestiture OGE-2025-089 to 098
documents.summary: OGE-issued Certificate of Divestiture providing tax-deferral treatment for a specific qualifying divestiture. Document content not publicly downloadable; available via Form 201 request.

documents.title: Compliance Certification
documents.summary: OGE-form certification. Marks Yes/No/N/A on standard sections (resignations, divestitures, periodic transaction reports filed, recusals, ethics briefing).
